updates.title: Are gifts received at wedding exempt from taxation? Here's what newlyweds should know
updates.summary: Indian weddings involve cash, gold, and gifts, which may raise tax concerns for newlyweds. The income tax law allows exemptions for gifts received during marriage, but they must still be disclosed as income. Details here.

updates.title: Can you use stock market losses to reduce tax on other capital gains? Income tax rules explained
